acceptance_criteria.text: Achieve the milestone described in the imported narrative (`tracking/milestones.md#M4`).
evidence: Security+ (SY0-701) is present as the second additional certification track in src/content/certifications.json with order 3 and idPrefix secplus.
src/content/security-plus/ contains domains, objectives, lessons, questions, flashcards, and PBQs.
2026-06-22 validation: node scripts/validate-content.mjs --strict-coverage reports security-plus: 5 domains, 199 questions, 45 flashcards, 9 PBQs, 41 lessons; 28/28 objectives complete.
2026-06-22 current-target check: CompTIA's Security+ certification page still lists Security+ V7 / SY0-701 as the live exam series; Security+ V8 is currently a draft under development.
